assessment_detail: Accepted trades per combo range **114–124** (session cap 1 / half-year).
notes: Adequate for plumbing + axis pivot detection; **not** adequate for distributional confidence on tail risk.

assessment_detail: 8/16 combos positive `total_r`; all positives share `rolling_low`; `signal_low` universally negative here.
notes: Strong **structural sensitivity** — any selection policy must surface stop-mode robustness.
Relative tail behavior diverges sharply between stop families.

assessment_detail: Stop mode >> target_r > body > VWAP (qual ordering).
notes: Dominant axis simplifies some analyses but flags **brittleness** if production uses mixed stops.

assessment_detail: Validated Phase6c sweep file + hash uniqueness + JSON blobs.
`params_json` stores grid slice only—not full resolved YAML.
notes: See `resolved_config_reconstruction_audit.md`; mitigations precede YAML promotion—not selection authoring.

assessment_detail: Single-symbol / single-window; argmax leakage likely without multi-window rituals.
notes: Recommend explicit multi-window veto + archival of supporting artifacts in design—not execution here.
Readiness pertains to **designing procedural gates + documentation**, not proclaiming profitability or promoting YAML.
